response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-native platform design as required; most recent work is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of multi-threaded, low-latency C++ systems or industrial IoT protocols.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community technical initiatives
Proven ability to deliver complex systems with high reliability and performance
concerns: No visible C++ experience in the last 9+ years; last C++ role was in 2015
Lacks documented experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No evidence of message brokers, MQTT, REST in industrial contexts or cloud platform architecture
